theory.name: UGMT_universe_law_strengthened
theory.definition: UGMT strengthened as a candidate universe-generative law with observer-canonicality and partial canonical witness selection
theory.formal: UGMT_strong = (Gen, Adm, Comp, Persist, GaugeReduce, Proj_obs^canon, Witness_partial)

verdict.core_answer: UGMT is now stronger than a generic umbrella: it is a candidate law for how the universe generates admissible structure, preserves it, filters symmetry redundancy, and presents observer-canonical slices that finite intelligence can reconstruct.
